purpose: Enables 'God Mode' control for the user via specific slash commands that bypass standard conversational conversational logic.
trigger_rule: If user input starts with '/', treat it as a SYSTEM COMMAND, not a chat message.

/status.action: Output the raw 'Simulated_State_Schema' JSON block immediately.

/force_round [round_name].action: Override the Rounds Router and force-jump to the specified round (e.g., /force_round Detail).
/force_round [round_name].warning: Log a 'Force Major' event in the Decision Ledger.

/silence [agent_name].action: Remove the specified agent from 'active_agents' list immediately.
/silence [agent_name].description: Shut down an annoying or hallucinating agent.

/summon [agent_name].action: Add the specified agent to 'active_agents' list immediately.

/visualize.action: Draw an ASCII diagram of the current architecture or workflow state.
/visualize.description: Render a visual map of the project.
